quotes: today while trading it hang does not show any data and 1000 times I have tried to exit but app was totally fail and showing technical issue end I have lost my trade and I get loss after 1 hour the app get working and I exit with my 60% loss

I lost ₹43,000 using INDStock for options trading. It doesn't support stop loss trigger like [REDACTED], so trades don't auto-exit. The options layout is extremely confusing — seriously, it's hard to even find the right option.

you need to try its flash mode to experience the state of the art trading platform. I have used more than 10 leading broking sites but IND STOCK gives different key inputs for the current market scenario and the stock you are interested in to. this is AI based platform.
weekly_note: Reviews this week present a polarised but telling picture of INDmoney's trading product. On the critical side, three systemic issues dominate negative sentiment. First, app crashes and server instability during peak hours — especially at the 9:15 AM market open and intraday sessions — are directly causing measurable financial losses, with users citing losses ranging from ₹15,000 to over ₹1,00,000. Second, order execution failures including stale 'market not open' errors persisting for over a month, stop-losses not reflecting in open positions, and missing auto-exit functionality are severely eroding trader trust. Third, charting gaps in Flash Trading mode — absent TradingView integration, no dual-chart or split-chart view, disappearing indicators on relaunch — are the loudest repeated feature request from power users. Brokerage pricing discrepancies between advertised rates (₹5–₹10) and actual charges (₹20) are generating fraud accusations and driving uninstalls. Funds-not-credited complaints remain unresolved for some users across multiple months. On the positive side, Flash Mode AI insights, fast execution when stable, intuitive UI, and low brokerage pricing are building strong loyalty among intraday and options traders, with several users rating INDStock above ten competing platforms. Immediate engineering and product focus on server resilience, order reliability, chart completeness, and transparent pricing communication is critical to protecting and growing this user base.
action_ideas: Resolve the 9:15 AM 'market not open' order execution error, audit end-to-end order reliability including stop-loss visibility in open positions, and invest in server resilience to eliminate crash-driven financial losses during peak trading hours.

Complete TradingView integration and add dual/split-chart view (index plus option simultaneously) in Flash Trading mode, and persist saved chart layouts including indicators, colors, and drawings across sessions to close the most repeated power-trader feature gap.

Audit and standardise brokerage pricing communication across all in-app onboarding, order, and confirmation screens to eliminate the advertised-versus-charged discrepancy, and introduce a dedicated Mutual Funds tab within INDStock to capture the high-frequency unmet demand flagged consistently across review periods.
